contato-descricao: Feel free to reach out or send me a message
contato-resumo:
I’m interested in freelance opportunities. However,
 if you have other request or question, don’t 
 hesitate to contact me
about-paragraph-1: I am someone who loves technology, explores different areas, builds various projects, and solves complex problems. My journey began with gaming, where I started developing and learning system logic in a self-taught way.
about-paragraph-2: Over time, I've been developing personal projects and deepening my technical skills. I enjoy testing various languages and have better expertise in backend and business rules, currently studying different architectures, microservices, and devops. I am currently studying Software Engineering at PUC Minas.

projects.title: projects
projects.subtitle: My works
projects.project-1-description: A Discord bot that provides comprehensive economy gameplay, featuring betting, RPG systems, and a global ranking, leveraging platform components and interactions to create a full gaming experience.
projects.project-1-details: Unfortunately, the project was discontinued due to lack of time, but it remains one of my best milestones for learning 'a bit of everything' about projects and programming. In it, I deepened my knowledge in scalable systems architecture, dynamic image manipulation with Canvas API, complex database integration, concurrent user management, debugging strategies, and backup systems.
projects.project-2-description: Patient management platform for psychologists, featuring systems for emotion tracking, sessions, and scheduling.
projects.project-2-details: PSI+ is a centralized platform for psychologists that integrates appointment scheduling, patient control, and detailed emotional tracking. It uses Azure SQLServer for the database, React with TailwindCSS on the frontend, and Java SpringBoot on the backend. Developed collaboratively via Discord and GitHub Projects, we applied MVC architecture and REST APIs to ensure a robust and integrated solution.
projects.project-2-award: Awarded best course project of the term
projects.project-3-description: Internal system for VTReal for financial management, auditing, and real-time analytical metrics for transportation vouchers.
projects.project-3-details: Web platform that centralizes the financial and analytical operations of VT Real. It automates savings calculations, monitors API requests, and provides dynamic dashboards (Chart.js/Recharts). Built with Next.js 15 and SpringBoot, the system uses MySQL in production on AWS, with JWT and Bcrypt authentication. The project was awarded best of the term due to its complexity and real-world value delivery.
projects.project-3-award: Best course project of the term

smallprojects.project-2-description: Mobile application with Expo + React Native + Firebase for study purposes.

smallprojects.project-4-description: Casino plugin in Java for Minecraft (Developed in 2018).
smallprojects.project-5-description: Test game made in Unity to study game development and C#.
smallprojects.project-6-description: Support ticket system for Discord platform using Node.js.
smallprojects.project-7-description: Minigame plugin for Minecraft built in Skript language (2018), essential for learning logic.
smallprojects.project-8-description: Creating minigames with Wired blocks, simulating programming logic for interactions and movements (pre-2016).
smallprojects.project-9-description: Blog system developed for studying the AdonisJS framework, featuring authentication and post CRUD.

job-description-1: Development of systems and platform extensions in Java and Javascript. SQL work, requirement gathering meetings, prototype validation, and training for clients.
job-description-2: Elaboration of 3D projects and 2D drawings for power transmission towers using BIM and AutoCAD for national energy infrastructure.
job-description-3: BIM modeling and technical detailing of 3D and 2D transmission towers. Developed strong organization, technical problem-solving, and engineering process skills.
